hero.headline: The residential security platform your community deserves
hero.subheadline: Simplify visitor management, guard operations, and resident communication — all in one platform built for modern communities.

items.title: Visitor logs on paper
items.description: Handwritten logs get lost, are illegible, and impossible to search when you need them most.

items.title: No real-time alerts
items.description: Residents find out about visitors only when the guard calls — or worse, when a stranger is already at their door.

items.title: Guard shift handoff gaps
items.description: Critical information gets lost between shifts, leaving security gaps during transitions.

items.title: Residents feel unsafe
items.description: Without visibility into who enters and exits, residents lose trust in their community's security.

items.title: HOA lacks visibility
items.description: Administrators have no data, no reports, and no way to measure whether security is actually working.

steps.title: Register your community
steps.description: Create your community profile and configure your security rules in minutes.

steps.title: Set up the guard booth
steps.description: Install the guard booth app on a tablet or computer — no special hardware required.

steps.title: Invite your residents
steps.description: Residents download the app and start pre-authorizing visitors immediately.

steps.title: Monitor everything
steps.description: Track entries, exits, incidents, and guard activity from a real-time dashboard.

features.headline: Everything you need to secure your community

admin.label: Admin
admin.title: Complete control
admin.description: Manage your community's security operations with powerful tools designed for property managers and HOA administrators.

items.title: Dashboard analytics
items.description: Real-time metrics on visitor traffic, guard activity, and community security trends.

items.title: Resident management
items.description: Add, remove, and manage residents and their units with bulk import support.

items.title: Blacklist control
items.description: Maintain a shared blacklist of denied individuals across all entry points.

items.title: Visitor history
items.description: Searchable log of every visitor entry and exit with timestamps and guard notes.

items.title: Amenity booking
items.description: Let residents reserve common areas and amenities through the platform.

guard.label: Guard
guard.title: Tools
guard.description: Give your guards the tools they need to work faster, smarter, and safer — even without internet.

items.title: Digital visitor log
items.description: Replace paper logs with a fast, searchable digital registry for every visitor.

items.title: Instant alerts
items.description: Notify residents the moment a visitor arrives — no phone calls needed.

items.title: Blacklist checking
items.description: Automatically flag denied individuals before they reach the gate.

items.title: Shift handoff
items.description: Digital shift reports ensure nothing gets lost between guard transitions.

items.title: Offline mode
items.description: The guard booth app works without internet and syncs automatically when connectivity returns.

resident.label: Resident
resident.title: Security
resident.description: Residents stay informed and in control of who visits their home — from anywhere.

items.title: Pre-authorize visitors
items.description: Send a visitor pass in advance so your guests breeze through the gate.

items.title: Real-time notifications
items.description: Get notified instantly when a visitor arrives, is approved, or is denied entry.

items.title: Request guard assistance
items.description: Send a help request directly to the guard booth with one tap.

items.title: Amenity reservations
items.description: Book common areas, sports courts, and event spaces from the app.

items.title: Built for Mexico
items.description: Designed specifically for the needs and workflows of Mexican residential communities.

items.title: Offline-first
items.description: The guard booth app works without internet and syncs when connectivity returns.

items.title: Easy setup
items.description: Get your community up and running in under 24 hours — no IT team required.

items.title: Affordable
items.description: Transparent pricing that fits communities of every size, with no hidden fees.

items.title: Real-time alerts
items.description: Residents and admins are notified instantly about visitor activity and security events.

items.title: Privacy focused
items.description: Your data is encrypted, securely stored, and never shared with third parties.

socialProof.headline: Built for Mexican residential communities
socialProof.story: RamcarSoftwas born from a simple frustration: security in residential communities relied on paper logs, phone calls, and guesswork. We set out to build a platform that gives property managers real visibility, guards real tools, and residents real peace of mind — starting with the communities that need it most.

pricing.headline: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your community. No hidden fees, no surprises.
pricing.trialNote: All plans include a 14-day free trial.

items.question: What hardware do we need?
items.answer: Just a tablet or computer with internet for the guard booth. Residents use their phones.

items.question: Does it work offline?
items.answer: Yes, the guard booth app works offline and syncs when connection is restored.

items.question: How is our data secured?
items.answer: End-to-end encryption, data stored in secure cloud infrastructure, regular security audits.

items.question: Is there a contract or commitment?
items.answer: No long-term contracts. Cancel anytime. All plans are month-to-month.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Most communities are up and running within 24 hours.

items.question: Can we import our existing resident list?
items.answer: Yes, we support bulk import via CSV.

items.question: Do you offer support in Spanish?
items.answer: Yes, our platform and support team are fully bilingual (Spanish and English).

cta.headline: Ready to secure your community?
cta.subtitle: Get started in minutes. No credit card required, no long-term commitment.
cta.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
